name: mpoint
description: Material points — the core MPM entity. Colour by a continuous field via 'color-by contour value <quantity>' (or 'property <name>'), or categorically by 'state' (constitutive-model state), 'model' (assigned cmodel), 'fixity', or 'group'.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Choose continuous (contour) or categorical (label) colouring. See sub-item 'color-by'.
Colour material points by constitutive-model state (elastic/plastic/yielded).
Colour material points by the assigned constitutive model.
Colour material points by velocity/fluid fixity condition.
Colour material points by group (optionally a slot).
Categorical colour/label by a named attribute.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Apply a 3D cutting plane to the item.
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Continuous contour (value/property) vs categorical label colouring of material points.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create mpoint color-by contour value stress-zz legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Contour material points by a stress component.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create mpoint color-by contour value displacement legend active on
plot item create mpoint state legend active on
plot item create mpoint model legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Colour points by their assigned cmodel.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against MPoint 3D 9.
